name: Spicy Country Pasta & Cheese
recipeIngredient: 1 cup White or shiitake mushrooms, sliced
1 cup Canned Italian tomatoes, chopped (reserve liquid)
5 small Black olives, sliced in half
2 cups Cooked penne or ziti pasta
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 3-quart microwavable casserole, combine onion, garlic, and oil. Stir to coat.
2. Microwave on high for 1 minute.
3. Add mushrooms and tomatoes with reserved liquid. Stir to combine. Cover and microwave on high for 7 minutes, stirring once every 3 minutes.
4. Add olives and crushed red pepper. Stir thoroughly.
5. To serve, arrange pasta in a serving bowl. Top with mushroom-tomato mixture and toss to combine. Sprinkle with parmesan cheese and garnish with basil.
Source: Weight Watchers Healthy Lifestyle Cookbook
Each serving contains: 3/4 fat exchange, 2 1/8 vegetable exchange, 2 bread exchanges, 10 optional calories.
Per serving: 275 calories
